reviews.review_description: as you can see by the title of my review i didn't even finish the tutorial and knew i was gonna play one round of this game pick another game and never play again the graphics are really bad i mean they could be worse but they're really bad when you shoot a gun the flash that comes out of the barrel like a real gun what so awful it looks nothing like you would expect from a game we're looking at the title it looks so awesome literally every time i would put a gun in my holsters when i picked up a magazine they would just fall out i really wouldn't recommend this game at all because when i went to go kill those dudes for the hostage rescue situation i shot them like 15 times and then they died i used the whole mag on one guy and then he finally died then when i was going to the area where you have to rescue the hostage and the tutorial there were people on the way there that you had to kill they were shooting me through walls i didn't know where they were shooting from so i just kept going and then i finally found them at first i thought they were invisible and my game was lagging no it was just them shooting through the walls honestly i didn't even finish the tutorial at the end the hostage was making this weird breathing sound and i said stop breathing and shot him cuz i thought it would just be funny and i didn't know the game would like get mad at me and then it did get mad at me and speaking of getting mad why is the guy who who talks to you screaming at you like when you do something new he just yells at you like you've done something wrong like i get it's a soldier game where you're training at the beginning but like it's so weird like i know that's not a big problem but it's just so weird and as soon as i got to the shooting range for the tutorial i automatically knew that the guns in this game we're gonna have awful and when i picked up a shotgun shell from my bullet holster it wasn't even there it was just an invisible shell that you could only see your fingers gripping i do not recommend do not waste your time on this game if i could i would give zero stars

reviews.review_title: An amazing game with lots of potential !
reviews.review_description:
I don't know why this game has such a bad rating; it is great, especially as it is free. The missions are great, and the more you advance into the levels, the more enemies you have to take out, as well as receiving more advanced guns and levels.

Shooting feels nice. Most of the people writing the reviews obviously haven't watched the tutorial, as it is easy to learn once you do.

My complaints:
* Needs multiplayer
* Needs more levels

My recommendations:
* Possibly AI SWAT partners
* Possibly a SWAT dog
* More SWAT tools like drones, flashbangs, etc.
* A specialized tool to communicate with the hostage-takers to surrender (phone, megaphone)

Please disregard the reviews; this is a great game, especially if you're into SWAT/law enforcement as well as shooting games.

Please fix the settings as i was really excited for this game now its not even functional no seated or standing mode settings no view settings no settings for people with motion sickness

Just buy tactical assault at this point   🥀 ts Lwk the sloppiest shi I’ve ever played or layed my eyes on. I regret defiling my quest three with this pig snot 🥀🥀🥀
I played the game It's js a knock off tactical assault vr I already have Tactical assault and it's better than this need better improvement

Life has its clues. In this case, it's an embedded anagram.

TaCtIcal StrIKE: hOStage reScue MissiON = TCISIKEOSSMON = MOTION SICKNESS

And this app is a boat, yeah, boatload of motion sickness. I got motion sickness in less than one minute playing this app. It usually takes about ten minutes before I get motion sickness. whoever designed this app was prescient in naming it in light of the embedded anagram which gives a clue to its pseudovisualmotor properties or lack thereof.
It honestly lacks any redeeming value whatsoever.
This app is what people who have been married multiple times would describe their first spouse as, useless and a waste of time.


This is strictly a discourse on the mechanics or paucity thereof of the structural mechanics of this app and not any personal attack on any of the developers or anyone else, you notice. Who knows who the developers are. This name, that name, is incidental. Any developer that cranks out a gem like would have a few motion sickness prone end users commenting about its singular qualities.

Another clue. This app is free.
If the app is free, the product is you!

Tactical Strike: Hostage Rescue Mission delivers a straightforward but enjoyable tactical experience. The core gameplay is simple and easy to grasp, making it quick to jump into the action. Missions offer enough variety to stay engaging, with different levels focused on rescuing hostages and clearing threats.

While the game isn’t highly polished yet, it remains fully playable and fun, with a strong foundation in place. With further refinement and added content, this could evolve into a very solid tactical shooter. A good choice for players looking for no-nonsense hostage rescue action and a promising base for future updates.

reviews.review_title: To tall make a calibration setting
reviews.review_description: Make your game actually playable dev

reviews.review_title: 0 star game, what makes this Special?
reviews.review_description:
What is this sad attempt at a game smh there's Nothing to fix just give me my money back!!

What Separates this Game from other low efforted shooting games??? Nothing 

Map incomplete, I can't run, no hit feedback animation, grappling the gun doesn't work smoothe can't even use the gun or aim it, 
3 tiny maps  . No meat to this game ... genuine waste of money...make this free or turn it to Early Access/beta you obviously ain't done.

Go look at what forefront just did and look at this wanna be game. Going into 2026 we tired of these  Low  Passion cash grab demos..  metas Refund policy is saving them from fake developers like you

................................

UPDATE NOV 10 after your response 💯 

First of all you need a Discord. Like every other Good game that cares to talk to the community that will be buying their games.

I'm not harsh I'm fair, I do like the graphics but that's maybe it.,🗣️

I don't know what you mean by Hit reactions are done procedurally, When you shoot people in this game they don't stumble nor do they move like they've been shot, It's like shooting at a sticker and they have red splash damage for effects, that's very Nintendo 64 ish as far as quality , When people get shot they wiggle,  jolt or stumble just so you know.


Technically I'm not talking about the animation for when they fall after being dead .I'm talking about when you're " actively" shooting them☝️
Just doesn't feel good


The second map is the map that doesn't work so I don't know what the third map even looks like. It looks like it's some type of playground, But it's actually a ghost town with nothing in it besides structures with nothing in it smh

When I mentioned forefront I'm really talking about how the guns handle compared to what your guns handle like,  I can't even hold it with two hands and shoot it wiggles everywhere and doesn't point to where you're shooting 

All I have is shooting games and I love them so I'm just being honest with you because I rather see this game do good than to be another sad attempt that fails and never Sees the light of day again

Be honest with yourselves does this game bring anything new?

I'll change my review to 5 stars just show some care please.

developer_response.body:
Hello, thank you for the feedback!
Could you please share which map you are finding incomplete? We will look into this issue.
Hit Reactions have been done procedurally through Physics Control and their reactions must've been subtle, we will try to exaggerate the reaction so that it will be clearly visible.
We are planning on adding more maps & game modes to the game, the reason they weren't shipped with release was because of optimisation issues. And our game is already in Early Access and players like you are valuable to improve the experience with your valuable feedback.
We will ensure that the tutorial experience is more helpful that gives the player better understanding of capabilities and constraints of the game.
We will also take into account what Forefront does for better player experience that improves the overall feel of the game and adapt them into the game. However since their game is more PVP focused than ours we might be limited in adapting their features.
Again, we would like to thank you for your feedback and apologise in any rough experience that you had with the game.
